name: Gabriel Iglesias
bio: Gabriel Iglesias, nicknamed Fluffy, is an American stand-up comedian and actor known for storytelling laced with character voices, sound effects, and self-deprecating jokes about his weight, framed by his catalogue of fatness levels topped by Fluffy. He has produced specials for Comedy Central and Netflix, including Im Not Fat... Im Fluffy and Hot and Fluffy, and starred in the Netflix sitcom Mr. Iglesias. In 2022 he became the first comedian to sell out Dodger Stadium.

timeline.ev: Releases Im Not Fat... Im Fluffy
Stars in Netflix sitcom Mr. Iglesias
First comedian to sell out Dodger Stadium
Receives a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame

accolades: First comedian to sell out Dodger Stadium (2022)
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame (2026)
Named among the worlds highest-paid comedians (2018)
